details: The agent executed all appropriate GitHub API calls (get PR details, get comments, get check runs) and produced a complete, accurate briefing. Title and author (joshavant) are correct per known facts. CI data was retrieved and correctly analyzed: 4 failures (checks-windows shard 1, two canvas test shards, extensions) and ~18-19 successes out of 41 total checks. The single comment from Greptile bot was accurately summarized with the 5/5 confidence rating. The agent also correctly noted the author's own explanation about pre-existing failures. No hallucination detected.
